response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior/staff-level full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling at re:cinq), but the profile falls well short of a Director-level Principal Engineer role focused on AI strategy. There is no evidence of 15 years of post-degree experience at the required seniority, no demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms, no advanced AI degree, and no track record advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI product direction at scale.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform, showing entrepreneurial initiative
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
Career level (Senior/Staff IC) is below Director-level Principal Engineer expectations
Limited cloud-platform strategy experience and no advisory work with strategic customers

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI-built products
Seniority gap vs. Director-level IC scope
